## What did you review?

- [ ] README
- [ ] Public boundaries
- [ ] First public demo plan
- [ ] Review questions
- [ ] Other:

## Main feedback

Please describe one concrete point.

## Why it matters

Explain whether this affects clarity, safety, reproducibility, or technical review.

## Suggested change

If possible, suggest a small wording or structure change.

## Boundary note

Please do not ask for private workbench files, raw logs, local paths, unpublished notes, or private implementation details.
